categories.NEG: Negative - system rejects what it should
categories.WORK: Work items - local Team Mode workflow
categories.GATE: Gates - local Team Mode decision workflow

Plan JSON output is valid JSON

validate --json returns envelope with ok and version
validate --json error returns envelope with error code
explain --pipeline --json returns envelope
fix --json returns envelope
history --json returns envelope
run --json pass returns structured output
run --json fail returns ok:true with failed status
run --json infra error returns ok:false with error code
Cache hit does not re-run side-effect command
cases.validated_by: Would fail if cache hit still executes the command body.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: second run executes command again instead of producing a cache hit.

cases.name: Second identical input run renders cache-hit glyph
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §CLI output rules — Glyph language; README.md §Content-addressed caching
cases.validated_by: Would fail if cached tasks use the pass glyph or execute again.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: identical second run renders passed glyph, not cache-hit glyph.

cases.name: Changing declared input re-executes task
cases.command: sykli >/dev/null && printf "// changed\n" >> main.go && sykli >/dev/null && test "$(wc -l < input_runs.log | tr -d ' ')" = 2
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: ignore task inputs in cache key; second run would stay cached and line count would be 1.

cases.name: Identical declared input keeps stable cache key
cases.validated_by: Would fail if cache fingerprint changes between identical runs.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: identical run executes again.

cases.name: Identical graph in sibling workdirs does not share local cache
cases.command: mkdir a b && cp sykli.exs a/ && cp sykli.exs b/ && (cd a && sykli >/dev/null) && (cd b && sykli >../b.out) && ! grep -q "○" b.out
cases.source: CLAUDE.md Recent changes; cache fingerprint includes repo-relative workdir
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: remove workdir from cache fingerprint; second sibling run would show cache hit.

cases.name: Cache stats stays parseable after failed cache candidate
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: hand-roll cache stats JSON without shared envelope; key assertion fails.

cases.name: Cache clean does not remove run occurrence memory
cases.command: sykli >/dev/null && test -f .sykli/occurrence.json && sykli cache clean >/dev/null && test -f .sykli/occurrence.json
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: cache clean removes all of .sykli; occurrence file assertion fails.

cases.name: Cache stats emits no ANSI in JSON mode
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: route JSON through TTY renderer; ANSI assertion fails.

cases.name: Cache hit is not reported as passed in JSON task status
cases.validated_by: Would fail if cached results collapse into passed.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: second run reports status passed.

cases.name: Cache miss leaves command stdout hidden by default
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: always stream task stdout; forbidden-output assertion fails.

cases.name: Cache-sensitive input change does not corrupt occurrence JSON
cases.command: sykli >/dev/null && printf "// changed\n" >> main.go && sykli >/dev/null && jq -e . .sykli/occurrence.json >/dev/null
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: write partial occurrence on cache invalidation; jq assertion fails.

cases.name: Cache metadata must not expose absolute temp workspace path
cases.command: sykli >/dev/null && if [ -d .sykli/cache ]; then ! grep -R "$(pwd)" .sykli/cache 2>/dev/null; else true; fi
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §Project principles — Local-first; CHANGELOG 0.5.0 Security OIDC temp files cleanup
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: persist absolute workspace path in cache metadata; grep assertion fails.

cases.name: Command non-zero is failed, not errored
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: map non-zero exits to errored; jq assertion fails.

cases.name: Missing secret is errored, not failed
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §TaskResult Status Values; CHANGELOG 0.5.0 OIDC/secret validation
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: treat secret resolution as command failure; jq assertion fails.

cases.name: Blocked dependent task never executes command side effect
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: schedule blocked downstream anyway; side-effect file assertion fails.

cases.name: Blocked dependent task is blocked in JSON
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: report dependency-blocked task as skipped; jq assertion fails.

cases.name: Validation cycle uses failure-with-data envelope
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: return structured Error for domain validation; .error null assertion fails.

cases.name: Self-dependency error names the offending task
cases.source: README.md §Pipelines are real code; CLAUDE.md §Graph validation
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: generic validation message; offending task assertion fails.

cases.name: Task timeout is errored, not failed
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: map timeouts to command failures; jq assertion catches it.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: timeout reports status failed.

cases.name: Conditional skip is skipped and not cached
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: skipped tasks pass through cache layer; jq assertion fails.

cases.name: validate --json has exact shared envelope keys
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: omit error key on success; exact-key assertion fails.

cases.name: run --json pass has exact shared envelope keys
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: add ad-hoc top-level status; exact-key assertion fails.

cases.name: JSON version is string one
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: serialize version as number; type assertion fails.

cases.name: JSON stdout is exactly one object and newline
cases.command: sykli validate --json | tee json.out >/dev/null; test "$(grep -c "^{" json.out)" = 1 && tail -c 1 json.out | od -An -t u1 | grep -q 10
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: print banner before JSON; object-count assertion fails.

cases.name: JSON mode emits no ANSI escapes
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: pass JSON through visual renderer; ANSI assertion fails.

cases.name: Malformed SDK output returns namespaced error code
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: use prose error code; regex assertion fails.

cases.name: validate domain errors keep error null and data present
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: return infrastructure error for duplicate names; assertion fails.

cases.name: history --json returns shared envelope without ANSI
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: history prints table in JSON mode; key/no-ANSI assertions fail.

cases.name: Two identical validate JSON outputs are byte-identical
cases.command: sykli validate --json > a.json && sykli validate --json > b.json && cmp -s a.json b.json
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: include wall-clock in validate payload; cmp assertion fails.

cases.name: Graph DOT output is byte-identical across runs
cases.command: sykli graph --dot > a.dot && sykli graph --dot > b.dot && cmp -s a.dot b.dot
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: include generated timestamp in graph output; cmp assertion fails.

cases.name: Occurrence shape is stable after stripping variable fields
cases.command: sykli >/dev/null && jq 'del(.id,.timestamp,.context.labels["sykli.run_id"],.data.tasks[].duration_ms,.data.duration_ms,.history.duration_ms,.history.steps[].duration_ms,.history.steps[].timestamp)' .sykli/occurrence.json > a.json && sykli >/dev/null && jq 'del(.id,.timestamp,.context.labels["sykli.run_id"],.data.tasks[].duration_ms,.data.duration_ms,.history.duration_ms,.history.steps[].duration_ms,.history.steps[].timestamp)' .sykli/occurrence.json > b.json && cmp -s a.json b.json
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §FALSE Protocol Occurrences; CLAUDE.md §Patterns & Conventions — NoWallClock
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: persist random field in occurrence data; normalized cmp fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: normalized occurrence payloads differ across identical runs beyond declared variable fields.

cases.name: No wall-clock timestamp appears in validate JSON
cases.command: if sykli validate --json | grep -Eq "20[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T"; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: include DateTime.utc_now in validate payload; grep assertion fails.

cases.name: No wall-clock timestamp appears in graph output
cases.command: if sykli graph | grep -Eq "20[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T"; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §No wall-clock or global RNG; CLAUDE.md §Patterns & Conventions — NoWallClock
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: stamp graph generation time; grep assertion fails.

cases.name: Credo NoWallClock rejects DateTime.utc_now fixture
cases.command:
tmp="SYKLI_ROOT/core/lib/sykli/phase_2_5_wall_clock_violation.ex"; printf "defmodule Sykli.Phase25WallClockViolation do
  def now, do: DateTime.utc_now()
end
" > "$tmp"; (cd SYKLI_ROOT/core && mix credo --strict >/tmp/sykli_credo_wall_clock.out 2>&1); status=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; test "$status" != 0 && grep -q "DateTime.utc_now" /tmp/sykli_credo_wall_clock.out
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: remove NoWallClock check; credo would pass and status assertion fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: the configured credo run did not reject a DateTime.utc_now file under lib/sykli.

cases.name: Conformance basic pipeline passes all SDKs
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: change one SDK basic JSON key; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for the basic pipeline.

cases.name: Conformance capabilities pass all SDKs
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: drop provides value in one SDK; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for capabilities.

cases.name: Conformance gates pass all SDKs
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: omit gate timeout serialization; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for gates.

cases.name: Conformance task inputs pass all SDKs
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: serialize inputs under covers; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for task inputs.

cases.name: Conformance duplicate-after edge is consistent
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: one SDK keeps duplicate deps; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for duplicate-after edges.

cases.name: Conformance empty provides value is preserved
cases.source: CHANGELOG 0.5.0 TypeScript/Python provides empty string fix
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: treat empty provides as undefined; conformance runner fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: cross-SDK conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox for empty provides values.

cases.name: Go SDK rejects cycle pre-emit
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: Go SDK emits cyclic graph; conformance error case fails.

cases.name: Python SDK rejects duplicate task names pre-emit
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: Python SDK accepts duplicate names; conformance error case fails.
cases.findings: Expected-red finding: Python duplicate-task validation conformance still fails in dogfood blackbox.

cases.name: Rust SDK rejects missing command pre-emit
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: Rust SDK emits no-command task; conformance error case fails.

cases.name: TypeScript SDK rejects unknown dependency pre-emit
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: TS SDK emits unknown dependency; conformance error case fails.

cases.name: Failing run prints sykli fix hint verbatim
cases.expect_stdout: Run  sykli fix  for AI-readable analysis.
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: remove fix hint from failure renderer; string assertion fails.

cases.name: Passing run contains no banned internal vocabulary
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §CLI output rules — item 2 (one accent color)
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: restore old level/debug output; forbidden-pattern assertion fails.

cases.name: Passing run uses pass glyph
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: replace pass glyph with checkmark; assertion fails.

cases.name: Failure run uses fail glyph
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: replace fail glyph with x; assertion fails.

cases.name: Blocked run uses blocked glyph
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: render blocked as skipped text without glyph; assertion fails.

cases.name: Piped run output contains no ANSI escapes
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §CLI output rules — item 5 (failure mode); non-TTY fallback
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: emit ANSI unconditionally; no-ANSI assertion fails.

cases.name: Passing five-task run has single summary line
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: print both old and new summaries; count assertion fails.

cases.name: Successful task stdout is hidden by default
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: stream stdout by default; forbidden-pattern assertion fails.

cases.name: validate accepts explicit sykli file path
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §Definition of done; one-line invocation consistency
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: validate only scans directories; explicit file path returns sdk_not_found.

cases.name: global --json before validate matches subcommand --json
cases.command: sykli --json validate > global.json && sykli validate --json > subcommand.json && cmp -s global.json subcommand.json
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §Definition of done; agent surface supports --json in any flag position
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: leading --json is parsed as a run flag and validate becomes a path.

cases.name: local work item CLI workflow persists state
cases.command: id=$(sykli work create "Investigate failing checkout deploy" --intent "Find failing step" --json | jq -r '.data.item.id') && sykli work list --json | jq -e --arg id "$id" '.ok == true and (.data.items | length) == 1 and .data.items[0].id == $id' >/dev/null && sykli work show "$id" --json | jq -e --arg id "$id" '.data.item.id == $id and .data.item.status == "open"' >/dev/null && sykli work claim "$id" --json | jq -e '.data.item.status == "claimed" and .data.item.assigned_to_type == "member"' >/dev/null && sykli work note "$id" "Found likely API breakage" --json | tee work-note.json >/dev/null && test -f ".sykli/work/items/$id.json" && cat work-note.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 1; docs/local-state-plane.md local work item state
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: omit work CLI persistence or JSON envelope; workflow jq/file assertions fail.

cases.name: work show rejects path traversal ids with JSON error
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md; local work items must not escape .sykli/work/items
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: pass raw ids into file path construction; traversal id is not rejected.

cases.name: run with work item records local run association
cases.command: id=$(sykli work create "Run associated with work item" --json | jq -r '.data.item.id') && sykli run --work "$id" --json | jq -e --arg id "$id" '.ok == true and .data.source == "local" and .data.work_item_id == $id and (.data.contract_hash | startswith("sha256:")) and .data.status == "passed"' >/dev/null && sykli work runs "$id" --json | jq -e --arg id "$id" '.ok == true and .data.work_item_id == $id and (.data.runs | length) == 1 and .data.runs[0].work_item_id == $id and (.data.runs[0].contract_hash | startswith("sha256:")) and .data.runs[0].status == "passed"' >/dev/null && ! grep -q "hello" ".sykli/work/items/$id.json" && sykli work runs "$id" --json
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: omit work_item_id or contract_hash from run history; work runs jq assertions fail.

cases.name: run with missing work item fails before execution
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 2; missing work item must fail before execution
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: run executes even when --work points at missing local work item.

cases.name: run with invalid work item id fails before execution
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md; work ids must not escape local state paths
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: pass --work id into local state path without validation.

cases.name: local gate decision CLI workflow persists state
cases.command: mkdir -p .sykli/gates && printf '%s\n' '{"id":"gate_001","version":"1","work_item_id":"work_001","run_id":"run_001","node_id":"approve","status":"waiting","reason":null,"requested_by_type":"system","requested_by_id":"executor","decided_by":null,"decided_at":null,"created_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","updated_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","evidence_refs":[{"type":"occurrence","uri":"local://.sykli/occurrence.json"}]}' > .sykli/gates/gate_001.json && printf '%s\n' '{"id":"gate_002","version":"1","work_item_id":"work_001","run_id":"run_001","node_id":"reject","status":"waiting","reason":null,"requested_by_type":"system","requested_by_id":"executor","decided_by":null,"decided_at":null,"created_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","updated_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","evidence_refs":[]}' > .sykli/gates/gate_002.json && sykli gates list --json | jq -e '(.data.gates | length) == 2 and .data.gates[0].id == "gate_001"' >/dev/null && sykli gate show gate_001 --json | jq -e '.data.gate.status == "waiting"' >/dev/null && sykli gate approve gate_001 --reason "Evidence reviewed" --json | jq -e '.data.gate.status == "approved" and .data.gate.reason == "Evidence reviewed"' >/dev/null && sykli gate reject gate_002 --reason "Not safe" --json | tee gate-reject.json >/dev/null && test -f .sykli/gates/gate_001.json && jq -e '.status == "approved" and .reason == "Evidence reviewed"' .sykli/gates/gate_001.json >/dev/null && ! grep -q "secret" .sykli/gates/gate_001.json && cat gate-reject.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 3; docs/local-state-plane.md local gate decision state
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: gate CLI does not persist decisions or returns non-envelope JSON; workflow assertions fail.

cases.name: gate show rejects path traversal ids with JSON error
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md; local gate ids must not escape .sykli/gates
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: pass raw gate ids into file path construction; traversal id is not rejected.

cases.name: terminal gate transition fails clearly
cases.command: mkdir -p .sykli/gates && printf '%s\n' '{"id":"gate_001","version":"1","work_item_id":null,"run_id":null,"node_id":"approve","status":"approved","reason":"Reviewed","requested_by_type":null,"requested_by_id":null,"decided_by":"member:yair","decided_at":"2026-05-09T10:01:00Z","created_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","updated_at":"2026-05-09T10:01:00Z","evidence_refs":[]}' > .sykli/gates/gate_001.json && sykli gate reject gate_001 --reason "No" --json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 3; terminal gate decisions must not be silently overwritten
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: approve/reject overwrites terminal gate state; invalid transition assertion fails.

cases.name: self-hosted coordinator skeleton serves authenticated work API
cases.command: port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >health.json; code=$(curl -s -o unauthorized.json -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}'); test "$code" = "401"; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >team.json; team=$(jq -r '.data.team.id' team.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"team_id\":\"$team\",\"title\":\"Coordinate team work\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/work-items" >work.json; work=$(jq -r '.data.work_item.id' work.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"assigned_to_type":"member","assigned_to_id":"yair"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/work-items/$work/claim" >claim.json; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"body":"Evidence reviewed"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/work-items/$work/notes" >note.json; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/work-items" >list.json; jq -e '.error.code == "coordinator.unauthorized"' unauthorized.json >/dev/null; cat list.json
cases.source: docs/self-hosted-coordinator.md Phase 4; coordinator skeleton must expose authenticated org/team/work APIs
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: coordinator write endpoints are unauthenticated or work API does not persist shared state.

cases.name: daemon joins coordinator and heartbeats
cases.command: port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >team.json; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --labels macos,docker --name yair-mbp --json >join.json; session=$(jq -r '.data.session.session_id' join.json); ! grep -q secret join.json; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"session_id\":\"$session\",\"status\":\"busy\",\"labels\":[\"macos\"],\"capabilities\":[\"local\"],\"last_run_id\":\"run_001\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/daemon-sessions/$session/heartbeat" >heartbeat.json; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/daemon-sessions" >sessions.json; cat sessions.json
cases.source: docs/daemon-join-protocol.md Phase 5; daemon join/heartbeat must be authenticated and presence-only
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: daemon join leaks token, defaults accepts_remote_work true, or heartbeat does not update coordinator state.

cases.name: team work CLI syncs through coordinator
cases.command: port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >team.json; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --name team-work-daemon --json >/dev/null; work=$(SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work create "Team work item" --team platform --json | jq -r '.data.item.id'); SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work list --team platform --json | jq -e --arg work "$work" '.data.source == "team" and .data.items[0].id == $work' >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work show "$work" --team platform --json | jq -e --arg work "$work" '.data.item.id == $work' >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work claim "$work" --team platform --json | jq -e '.data.item.status == "claimed" and .data.item.assigned_to_type == "member"' >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work note "$work" "Found likely API breakage" --team platform --json >note.json; test ! -f ".sykli/work/items/$work.json"; local=$(sykli work create "Local still default" --json | jq -r '.data.item.id'); test -f ".sykli/work/items/$local.json"; cat note.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 6; team work commands use coordinator only when --team is explicit
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: team work commands fall back to local, omit auth/session, or leak raw logs/artifacts/secrets.

cases.name: team work without join fails without local fallback
cases.command: SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli work create "Should not be local" --team platform --json >out.json; code=$?; test "$code" = 1; test ! -d .sykli/work/items; cat out.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-security.md; team mode must not silently fall back to local mode
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: missing coordinator session still creates a local .sykli work item.

cases.name: joined daemon syncs passing run summary
cases.command: port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >/dev/null; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --name run-sync-daemon --json >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli --json >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli daemon status --json >/dev/null; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs" >runs.json; cat runs.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 7; joined daemons publish metadata-only run summaries
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: run summaries are not synced, include raw evidence bytes, or leak token/log/artifact fields.

cases.name: joined daemon syncs failing run error code and evidence ref
cases.command: printf '%s\n' 'IO.puts(~s({"version":"1","tasks":[{"name":"fail","command":"exit 7"}]}))' > sykli.exs; port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >/dev/null; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --name run-sync-daemon --json >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli --json >/dev/null || true; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli daemon status --json >/dev/null; run=$(curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs" | jq -r '.data.items[0].id'); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs/$run" >run.json; cat run.json
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md evidence reference pattern; failing run sync stores references not bytes
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: failed summaries omit error_code/evidence_refs or upload occurrence bytes.

cases.name: joined daemon syncs success criteria results
cases.command: printf '%s\n' 'IO.puts(~s({"version":"3","tasks":[{"name":"test","command":"true","success_criteria":[{"type":"exit_code","equals":0}]}]}))' > sykli.exs; port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap 'kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >/dev/null; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --name run-sync-daemon --json >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli --json >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli daemon status --json >/dev/null; run=$(curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs" | jq -r '.data.items[0].id'); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs/$run" >run.json; cat run.json
cases.source: docs/team-mode-roadmap.md Phase 7 sync set; success criteria results are projected into coordinator state
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: run summary drops success_criteria_results.

cases.name: run summary outbox replays after coordinator outage
cases.command: port=$((24000 + RANDOM % 10000)); SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord1.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org.json; org=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >/dev/null; sykli daemon join --coordinator "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --org false-systems --team platform --token secret --name run-sync-daemon --json >/dev/null; kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli --json >/dev/null; test -f .sykli/outbox/runs/*.json; SYKLI_COORDINATOR_TOKEN=secret sykli coordinator start --port "$port" >coord2.log 2>&1 & pid2=$!; trap 'kill $pid2 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; for i in {1..80}; do curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.1; done; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"slug":"false-systems","name":"False Systems"}' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/orgs" >org2.json; org2=$(jq -r '.data.org.id' org2.json); curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"org_id\":\"$org2\",\"slug\":\"platform\",\"name\":\"Platform\"}" "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/teams" >/dev/null; SYKLI_TEAM_TOKEN=secret sykli daemon status --json >/dev/null; test ! -e .sykli/outbox/runs/*.json; curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer secret' "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/runs" >runs.json; cat runs.json
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md survivability; outbox replays after coordinator outage
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: deferred run summary is not written, not drained, or not idempotently accepted.

cases.name: local-only run writes no team outbox
cases.command: sykli --json >/dev/null; test ! -e .sykli/outbox/runs/*.json; jq 'del(.id, .timestamp)' .sykli/runs/latest.json >normalized.json; jq -e '.overall == "passed" and (.work_item_id == null) and (.contract_hash == null)' normalized.json >/dev/null; cat normalized.json
cases.source: docs/local-state-plane.md survivability; daemons without coordinator sessions remain local-only
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: local-only runs attempt team sync or write .sykli/outbox/runs without a joined session.

cases.name: Receiver refuses to start without webhook role
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §OTP Supervision Tree — webhook receiver role
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: always start Bandit listener; --help would fail or bind unexpectedly.

cases.name: Legacy GitHub status fallback remains available
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: require GitHub App env for all GitHub-aware commands; validate would fail.

cases.name: GitHub App env vars are not required for local-first run
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: make App credentials mandatory at boot; local run fails.

cases.name: Absolute host path read from task command fails safely
cases.source: CLAUDE.md §Runtime isolation and path containment; CHANGELOG 0.2.0 path traversal vulnerability fix
cases.validated_by: Injected bug: execute task commands directly on host with unrestricted absolute paths; escaped file assertion fails.
cases.findings: Currently fails under local shell runtime if task commands can read /etc/passwd into the workspace.
